subcodes.first_line: O phoenix of fire, by the countenance of the Beloved set ablaze! May thy Lord assist thee in service to His Cause throughout all conditions and circumstances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر آتش روی جمال جانان ایدک ربک علی خدمه امره فی جمیع الشئون و الاحوال
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @praise and encouragement
